Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan’s Artworks Exhibited in Paris

Our faculty member in the Department of Molecular Biology and Genetics,

Emeritus Prof. Önder Pekcan

, is making a name for herself not only with her academic work but also with her artistic work.

Prof. Pekcan, who also works in the fields of painting and photography, was most recently invited to the mixed art exhibition

held in France on

June 29-20.

We congratulate Prof. Pekcan, who participated in this exhibition with two of her paintings, and wish her continued success in her artistic life.

Click

here to view the exhibition book.
